1.title: Domain Model & Constraints
1.instruction: Document entities (customer, subscription, plan, delivery window, recipe, ingredient, allergens, add-ons) and business constraints (cutoffs, skip rules) in `docs/meal_kit_domain.md`.

2.title: Menu & Recipe Service
2.instruction: Implement a service to manage weekly menus, recipes, dietary tags, and seasonal rotations. Expose APIs to fetch available recipes and their allergen metadata.

3.title: Subscription Checkout & Billing
3.instruction: Build plan selection, delivery frequency, address capture, payment, discounts, and taxes/shipping calculations. Persist subscriptions with status and next delivery date.

4.title: Delivery Scheduling & Cutoffs
4.instruction: Implement delivery window selection, cutoff enforcement for changes/skips, and rules for pausing or resuming a subscription.

5.title: Fulfillment & Packaging Rules
5.instruction: Generate weekly pick lists per order, enforce cold-chain packaging rules, and record packaging choices for sustainability metrics.

6.title: Notifications & Order Status
6.instruction: Send confirmation, shipment, ETA, delivery issue, gift card redemption, and allergen substitution notifications over email/SMS. Expose order status APIs for the customer portal.

7.title: Support & Refund Flows
7.instruction: Define flows for substitutions, refunds, and missed deliveries. Capture support tickets and consequences on order state and billing.

8.title: Gift Card Purchase & Redemption
8.instruction: Add flows to buy, email, and redeem gift cards. Track balances, partial redemptions, and fraud/abuse checks. Integrate with checkout to apply balances before charging.

9.title: Allergen Substitution Flow
9.instruction: Allow customers to request substitutions for flagged allergens before cutoff, update pick lists, adjust nutrition metadata, and notify fulfillment/support of changes.
